article.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored a career-high 55 points as the Oklahoma City Thunder won their second straight double-overtime game to begin the season, beating the Indiana Pacers 141-135 on Thursday night in a rematch of last season's NBA Finals teams.
article.headline: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scores career-high 55 to lead Thunder past Pacers 141-135 in 2 OTs

images.caption: Isaiah Hartenstein throws down the lob for a much-needed Thunder and-1.
images.name: Isaiah Hartenstein slams home a big-time and-1 for Thunder

article.linkText: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scores career-high 55 to lead Thunder past Pacers 141-135 in 2 OTs
article.story: INDIANAPOLIS -- — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored a career-high 55 points as the Oklahoma City Thunder won their second straight double-overtime game to begin the season, beating the Indiana Pacers 141-135 on Thursday night in a rematch of last season's NBA Finals teams. The reigning MVP reached 50 for the fifth time, tying Russell Westbrook for most by a Thunder player. Ajay Mitchell added a career-best 26 points for Oklahoma City, which outlasted Houston on Tuesday in its season opener. Gilgeous-Alexander fueled the decisive flurry to open the second overtime. The officials also granted a late timeout to Oklahoma City when it appeared Obi Toppin had stolen the inbound pass underneath the Thunder basket. Gilgeous-Alexander was 15 of 31 from the floor and 23 of 26 from the free throw line while adding eight rebounds and eight assists. Aaron Wiggins finished with 23 points and nine rebounds. Isaiah Hartenstein grabbed 14 rebounds. Bennedict Mathurin had 36 points and 11 rebounds for the Pacers before fouling out in the first overtime. Pascal Siakam had 32 points and 15 rebounds for Indiana, which is without two-time All-Star guard Tyrese Haliburton and backup point guard T.J. McConnell, then lost guard Andrew Nembhard with a sore left shoulder in the first half. Yet the Pacers still had enough scoring punch to stay close. Neither team led by more than seven points in a game marred by 70 fouls called on the players and a technical foul called on Indiana coach Rick Carlisle. The Pacers hung their Eastern Conference championship banner before Gainbridge Fieldhouse opened, and the Pacers honored the matriarch of the franchise, the late Nancy Leonard, before the national anthem was played. Leonard helped save the team with a telethon in 1977. She died in September at age 93. Up next Thunder: Heads to Atlanta on Saturday. Pacers: Begin a three-game road trip at Memphis on Saturday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/NBA

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.

images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.

videos.description: Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights
videos.headline: Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander shines once more for the Thunder, this time putting up a gargantuan 55 points against the Pacers.
videos.headline: SGA wows with career-high 55 as OKC outlasts Indiana in 2OT

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (SGA wows with career-high 55 as OKC outlasts Indiana in 2OT) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Chet Holmgren gathers the loose ball and takes it coast-to-coast for a Thunder bucket.
videos.headline: Chet Holmgren gets it done on both sides of the ball

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chet Holmgren gets it done on both sides of the ball) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Bennedict Mathurin pulls up and buries a 3 to beat the shot clock for the Pacers.
videos.headline: Bennedict Mathurin buries a 3 from the wing for the Pacers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Bennedict Mathurin buries a 3 from the wing for the Pacers) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander drives and gets an impressive acrobatic and-1 to fall.
videos.headline: SGA gets acrobatic and-1 to fall

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA gets acrobatic and-1 to fall ) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Obi Toppin slams it home over Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and Chet Holmgren.
videos.headline: Obi Toppin rises for a big-time flush

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Obi Toppin rises for a big-time flush) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander fades away from Bennedict Mathurin and buries a jumper for the Thunder.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA drains a sweet jumper over Bennedict Mathurin) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Pascal Siakam drains a hard-fought bucket over Chet Holmgren for the Pacers.

videos.description: Pascal Siakam posts up Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and gets an impressive bucket to fall for Pacers.
